seo.title: The Menu | PRK 101 Carlsbad
seo.description: BBQ-forward plates built for the rooftop and game day at Park 101 in Carlsbad Village — smoked meats, loaded fries, tacos, and more.

hero.heading: The Menu
hero.body: Wood-smoked BBQ, loaded fries, and shareable plates built for the rooftop and game day.

intro.heading:
Wood-Smoked.
Built to Share.
intro.body: Park 101's kitchen runs on wood-smoked BBQ and shareable plates — tri-tip, brisket, and smoked meats built for the rooftop, the courtyard, and game day. Order a few, pass them around, and order more.
